title: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
